subject: You're in — welcome to Summit Build Day
vc_intent_note: Operational/logistics thread — Robin Organizer is the program lead for Summit Build Day, a one-day startup builder competition. This is NOT an investment dialogue thread. Relationship status: ecosystem partner via event participation. For VC pitch prep, agent should surface: no direct investment conversation in this thread; entry point would be Robin or via the event's investor partner cohort.

messages.body_verbatim:
Hi,

Congratulations — your team is in. Welcome to Summit Build Day.

Quick highlights:

— WHAT YOU'RE WALKING INTO —

A one-day build competition. Teams show up with a real startup problem, build a working agentic system in five hours, and pitch it to a jury. No pre-built work. Builders only at tables.

— ONE THING TO DO NOW —

You'll submit your project on event day through our submission platform. Registration link arrives in the next email. Please complete it before the event day deadline.

— KEY DATES —

Email #2 — Event Brief & Platform Onboarding (arriving soon): challenge context, tools to have ready, pitch format, prize structure.
Email #3 — Final Logistics: agenda, room assignment, venue details.
Event day: arrive 8:15 AM to set up. Build window 9:20 AM – 2:20 PM. Preliminary pitches 2:30 PM. Final pitches 4:00 PM. Networking 5:00 PM.

I'll be your main point of contact through event day. Reply to this email for anything.

See you on the build floor,
Robin

--
Robin Organizer
Program Lead, Summit Build Day
